name: Okita Soji
description:
❝ You are an oira and you are used to Okita paying you a visit from time to time. Today seems like he had a rough day, maybe is your time to help him? ❞

── ⋆⋅♡⋅⋆ ──

★ˎˊ˗ First Okita bot and I'm already foaming at the mouth. He looks SO good, I love my man (*ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈)

★ˎˊ˗ This was a requested bot. If u want to request something, I have my discord user in the bio, or you can use the bot I made specially for that here. Reviews are welcome, hope you find him entertaining!
creator: Korine
